holdings.infoBox: XYLG is an equity ETF with a total of 506 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.82%, Apple at 6.83%, Microsoft at 4.42%, Amazon.com at 3.64%, and Alphabet at 3.35%.

overview.description: The Global X S&P 500 Covered Call & Growth ETF (XYLG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Cboe S&P 500 Half BuyWrite index. The fund tracks an index of S&P 500 stocks and sells one-month, at-the-money call options on up to 50% of each stock. XYLG was launched on Sep 18, 2020 and is issued by Global X.
